history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a dark-themed game UI screen with a “LEVEL UP!” header and a level profile card displaying progress stats.

Main Subject:
A level-up interface with a large title area reading “LEVEL UP!” at the top and a centered panel showing “SILUET 101” alongside multiple progress indicators and stat boxes. On the left side of the panel, there is a circular avatar image showing a helmeted character with bright pink, red, yellow, and green highlights.

Setting:
This appears to be an on-screen digital interface on a dark background with a muted gradient. No real-world environment is visible, and the lighting comes from the UI’s graphical elements.

Visual Details:
At the top center, the text “LEVEL UP!” is displayed in gold with decorative diamond-like marks on both sides. Below it, a large rounded rectangle panel with a subtle border contains the content. Near the top left within the panel is the bold white text “SILUET 101,” with a small yellow circular badge to the right showing “#76.” Under the name is smaller text “LEVEL PROGRESS.” In the left column, a circular avatar is framed by a purple ring. To the right of the avatar, there are two rounded rectangular boxes: one reads “LEVEL” with a large white “5,” and the other reads “EXPERIENCE” with “12 / 300” in teal. Beneath these is a long horizontal progress bar with a purple filled portion on the left and a percentage label “4%” on the right. At the bottom of the panel are three darker rounded boxes with labels and numbers: “MESSAGES” with “103,” “XP NEEDED” with “288,” and “NEXT LVL” with “6.” Very faint text near the bottom center of the panel reads “Congratulations on leveling up!” but it is low-contrast and partially obscured.

Visible Text:
LEVEL UP!
SILUET 101
#76
LEVEL PROGRESS
LEVEL
5
EXPERIENCE
12 / 300
4%
MESSAGES
103
XP NEEDED
288
NEXT LVL
6
Congratulations on leveling up!

Practical Summary:
This image displays a game-style “level up” screen showing a character or profile named “SILUET 101” with level and experience progress. It includes a progress bar and three stat boxes for messages, XP needed, and the next level.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
